settings.title: Embed Settings
settings.description: Configure how this agent can be embedded in external websites
settings.enabledDescription: Allow this agent to be embedded in external websites via iframe
settings.allowedDomainsDescription: Leave empty to allow all domains. Supports wildcard subdomains (*.example.com).
settings.invalidDomain: Domain "{value}" is invalid. Use a hostname like example.com or example.com:3000.
settings.invalidPrimaryColor: Primary color must be a valid hex color like #6366f1.
settings.bubbleGreetingPlaceholder: Hi! How can I help you?
settings.apiKeyDescription: Paste your API key here. It will be included in the code snippet below.
settings.codeSnippetDescription: Copy and paste this code into your website
settings.requiresPublish: Agent must be published before embedding

page.defaultGreeting: Hi! How can I help you?
page.fillRequired: Please fill in required fields first
